description: Classic Frogger — cross the road dodging cars, then ride logs across the river to reach lily pads. Portrait mobile-friendly layout, swipe + arrow-key controls, RAF game loop, localStorage high score.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated from mchatai.com/hub/frogger/play (publisher GI1GHQ7w). Lane-based traffic + log-raft logic + lily-pad goal-state machine all working. Portrait layout with touch-swipe controls. Preserve the lane-array model and per-row velocity grouping when modifying.
